svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="对比" id="compare"> <mxGraphModel dx="-564" dy="-149" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1080" pageHeight="620" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="命令行工作流 vs 云效 CI/CD：能力对照" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="500" x="290" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1e293b;strokeColor=#1e293b;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="能力" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="300" x="60" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1e293b;strokeColor=#1e293b;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="命令行工作流" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="360" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1e293b;strokeColor=#1e293b;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="云效 CI/CD" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="560" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1e293b;strokeColor=#1e293b;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="说明" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="260" x="760" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1c1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="CI 发现问题后自动修复" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="60" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1c2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#16a34a;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="✓ 能" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="360" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1c3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef2f2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=13;" value="✗ 只报红挂掉" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="560" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1c4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="审查→主会话改→推送更新MR→收敛才合并" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="760" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2c1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="连生产服务器排查" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="60" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2c2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#16a34a;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="✓ 能" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="360" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2c3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef2f2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=13;" value="✗ 单向流水线" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="560" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2c4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="/prod-debug 切 prod profile 连生产库" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="760" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3c1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="高危操作停下来问人" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="60" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3c2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#16a34a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="✓ 有「询问」中间态" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="360" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3c3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef2f2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=13;" value="✗ 要么过要么挂" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="560" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3c4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="大重构/架构改动停下汇报等指示" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="760" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r4c1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="无人值守 / 定时触发" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="60" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r4c2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#92400e;fontSize=12;" value="△ 靠夜间 Loop 补" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="360" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r4c3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#16a34a;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="✓ 原生支持" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="560" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r4c4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="push master 自动跑，不依赖开发者机器" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="760" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r5c1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="构建产物 / 版本 / 审计留痕" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="60" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r5c2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#92400e;fontSize=12;" value="△ 仅本地 jar" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="360" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r5c3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#16a34a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="✓ 制品仓库 + 历史" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="560" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r5c4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="制品库存 30 天，可一键回滚" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="760" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r6c1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="标准门禁（覆盖率/ArchUnit）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="60" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r6c2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#92400e;fontSize=12;" value="△ 命令里写死" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="360" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r6c3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#16a34a;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="✓ 平台原生" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="560" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r6c4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="mvn verify 内嵌 ArchUnit + JaCoCo 门禁" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="760" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="前三行：命令行独占优势（需要判断的环节）
后三行：云效占优（需要确定性的环节）—— 这就是两套并存的理由" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="720" x="180" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
前三行：命令行独占优势（需要判断的环节）
后三行：云效占优（需要确定性的环节）—— 这就是两套并存的理由
